name_en: Travel Bag 💫MCM💫 Traveler Visetos Weekend Travel Bag. Made of durable Visetos print 🌺 coated canvas and bonded lining, this item reduces weight and is one of our top lightweight Visetos weekend ✈️ travel bags. This classic design features an easy-to-close extended ⛓️ zipper and can be folded for storage when not in use. Dimensions: Length 50cm, Height 29cm, Bottom Thickness 20cm
